# Notes

## unitconv \- nearest conversion
if you pass the program the &apos;nearest&apos; parameter then it will try to
find units that, when the value is converted, will yield small, whole numbers or
simple fractions\.



It can be useful if you want to understand the derivation of a value\. For
instance, given a distance of 10\.05534 metres, using this parameter
\(especially with the &apos;roughly&apos; parameter\) can help you identify this
as two rods or half a chain\.
